title: explicit cast should not be required
body:
In the following code:

```
if( is_im_logic ) md_ctrl = fetch_next_md; else md_ctrl = fetch_first_md;
md_ctrl    = (is_im_logic ? fetch_next_md : fetch_first_md);
```
where md_ctrl is an enumerated type, the first line will be parsed correctly while the second one produces the error `This assignment requires an explicit cast.`

I think both lines are equivalent and the error should not occur. 
This is tested in version Icarus Verilog version 12.0 (stable) (s20221226-36-g23e51ef7a)
code_blocks:
if( is_im_logic ) md_ctrl = fetch_next_md; else md_ctrl = fetch_first_md;
md_ctrl    = (is_im_logic ? fetch_next_md : fetch_first_md);
